title: Peppery Creamy Middle Eastern Egg Noodles Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful dish featuring egg noodles mixed with a creamy sauce infused with peppercorns, designed to be both comforting and appetizing for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Egg Noodles
ingredients.notes: Use any type of egg noodles

ingredients.name: Vegetable Broth
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's cooked and cooled to room temperature

ingredients.name: Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Full-fat or reduced fat, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: Fermented Vegetables (Kvask)
ingredients.notes: Can be used in place of regular vegetables, such as carrots and cucumbers

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add egg noodles and cook according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine almond milk, sunflower seeds, and fermented vegetables. Blend until smooth.
Pour the blended mixture into a mixing bowl with the cooked egg noodles and vegetable broth. Stir well.
Add fresh basil leaves and green onions to the noodle mixture. Mix gently but thoroughly.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste. Heat up the dish over medium heat, stirring occasionally until warm.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Garnish with more freshly chopped green onions if desired.
